title: Expressions, Control Flow, Iteration, Switches, and Deferred Work · Execution Trace: Switch Type Select Control
summary: A retry policy must classify states, bound attempts, accumulate evidence, and guarantee cleanup across early returns. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go switch type select control increment in a bounded retry and classification engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose expression switches, type switches, labeled control, and select only when their matching and termination behavior is explicit.
Build bounded for loops and range loops while reasoning about copied iteration values, indexes, order, and Go 1.22 loop variables.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
